Ikatan Mahasiswa Muhammadiyah Korkom UNI: Muhammadiyah Students Association Korkom UNISA. All Rights Reserved.
about_p1: Muhammadiyah Students Association (IMM) is an Islamic student movement and one of Muhammadiyah's autonomous organizations born in Yogyakarta on March 14, 1964 CE or coinciding with 29 Shawwal 1384 AH.
Latar Belakang Berdirinya IMM: Background of the Establishment of IMM
about_p2: The birth of IMM was driven by the urgent need to foster Muhammadiyah cadres at the tertiary level. At that time, there was a strong desire to produce "Intellectual Muslims" capable of effectively spreading Muhammadiyah's da'wah on campuses. In addition, the unstable conditions of the Indonesian nation and the rampant ideological competition during 1950-1964 made Muhammadiyah see the need for a special forum to fortify students from ideologies contrary to Islamic teachings.
about_p3: Pioneering figures who played a very important role in the founding of IMM include Djazman Al-Kindi, Rosyad Sholeh, Sudibyo Markus, Amien Rais, and several other Muhammadiyah student figures who proposed the formation of this organization to the Muhammadiyah Central Executive.
Dalam peresmiannya, dideklarasikan \"Ena: During its inauguration, the "Six Affirmations of IMM" were declared which became the main foundation of the organization's struggle:
Menegaskan bahwa IMM adalah gerakan maha: Affirming that IMM is an Islamic student movement.
Menegaskan bahwa kepribadian Muhammadiya: Affirming that the Muhammadiyah personality is the foundation of IMM's struggle.
Menegaskan bahwa fungsi IMM adalah ekspo: Affirming that the function of IMM is as a student exponent within Muhammadiyah.
Menegaskan bahwa IMM adalah organisasi y: Affirming that IMM is a legal organization by heeding all laws, regulations, and the basis and philosophy of the state.
Menegaskan bahwa ilmu adalah amaliah dan: Affirming that knowledge is practical and practice is scientific.
Menegaskan bahwa amal IMM adalah lillahi: Affirming that IMM's charity is lillahi ta'ala (for the sake of Allah) and is always dedicated to the interests of the people.
